posts.title: npm install hexo-generator-json-content --save时出现问题
posts.text: 执行 1npm install hexo-generator-json-content --save 报错 12345678npm WARN babel-eslint@10.0.2 requires a peer of eslint@>= 4.12.1 but none is installed. You must install peer dependencies yourself.npm WARN optional SKIPPING OPTIONAL DEPENDENCY: fsevents@1.2.9 (node_modules\fsevents):npm WARN notsup SKIPPING OPTIONAL DEPENDENCY: Unsupported platform for fsevents@1.2.9: wanted {"os":"darwin","arch":"any"} (current: {"os":"win32","arch":"x64"})+ hexo-generator-json-content@4.1.6added 6 packages from 24 contributors and audited 9189 packages in 15.261sfound 1 low severity vulnerability run `npm audit fix` to fix them, or `npm audit` for details 原因：eslint 插件没有安装 解决办法 1npm install eslint@4.x babel-eslint@8 --save-dev

posts.title: Hello World
posts.excerpt: Welcome to Hexo! This is your very first post. Check documentation for more info. If you get any problems when using Hexo, you can find the answer in troubleshooting or you can ask me on GitHub.
posts.text: Welcome to Hexo! This is your very first post. Check documentation for more info. If you get any problems when using Hexo, you can find the answer in troubleshooting or you can ask me on GitHub. Quick StartCreate a new post1$ hexo new "My New Post" More info: Writing Run server1$ hexo server More info: Server Generate static files1$ hexo generate More info: Generating Deploy to remote sites1$ hexo deploy More info: Deployment
